# Awesome MFF CUNI

This is a template for writing theses at the Faculty of Mathematics and Physics of the Charles University in Prague, Czech Republic.

## PDF-A compatibility

It is enough to add `--pdf-standard a-2u` to the compiler arguments to get a valid PDF-A according to school guidelines. The template passes PDF-A validation using the official [profile](https://cuni.cz/UK-7987.html). You can also try the validation yourself using the following [Docker container](https://github.com/exaexa/cuni-thesis-validator).

## Licensing

This template includes the logo of the Faculty of Mathematics and Physics saved in the `img/` directory. Usage conditions for the logo are available [here](https://www.mff.cuni.cz/en/faculty/visual-identity). The rest of the package is distributed under the MIT license. For the `template/` folder, the MIT No-Attribution license is used instead.
